HGSS.689.0001:
Not too shabby... You’re doing
something right if you can beat me,\r
even by an unlikely fluke...\f
I like you!
Give me your number!\f
You can be my practice partner! [0200,0000]
HGSS.689.0002:
Don’t get too high and mighty
about beating me! It was a fluke!
HGSS.689.0003:
I don’t believe it! You’re going to
regret this!
HGSS.689.0004:
Give me your phone number!\f
You are going to be my practice
partner![0200,0000]
HGSS.689.0006:
What are you saying? 
You really like Route 27?\f
I do too, of course!\f
I mean, I’m always on Route 27!
HGSS.689.0007:
Listen, pal of mine...
Do you remember my [0100,000A,0000]?\f
Yes, exactly. That lovely [0100,000A,0000].
Wouldn’t you agree it’s a perfect match\r
for me?\f
Fine, you may go.
HGSS.689.0008:
Have I ever faced a wild [0100,000B,0000]?
You need to ask?\f
I’ve beaten [0100,000B,0000] on numerous
occasions!\f
Fine, you may go.
HGSS.689.0009:
Have I ever failed to catch a wild
Pokémon?\f
You need to ask?\f
I would never fail to catch a wild
[0100,000B,0000]... Oh! Never mind!
HGSS.689.0010:
We are going to battle!\f
The place shall be [0104,0003,0000]!
Don’t keep me waiting! Got it?
HGSS.689.0011:
What are you doing?\f
I told you that the place was\r
[0104,0003,0000]! Don’t try to run!
HGSS.689.0012:
Don’t be too proud just because you
happened to beat me...\r
It was a fluke!
